entry.content: 问题描述 多叉树后序遍历 12345678910class Node{public: int val; vector<Node*> children; Node() {} Node(int _val, vector<Node*> _children){ val = _val; chilren = _children; }}; 迭代 123456789101112131415// Javapublic List<Integer> postorder(Node root){ LinkedList<Node> stack = new LinkedList<>(); LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); if(root == null) return output; stack.add(root); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ Node node = stack.pollLast(); output.addFirst(node.val); for(Node item: node.children){ if(item != null) stack.add(item); } } return output;} 123456789101112# Pythondef postorder(self, root): if root is None: return [] stack, output = [root, ], [] while stack: root = stack.pop() if root is not None: output.append(root.val) for c in root.children: stack.append(c) return output[::-1] 12345678910111213141516// C++vector<int> postorder(Node* root){ if(root == NULL) return {}; vector<int> res; stack<Node*> stk; stk.push(root); while(!stk.empty()){ Node* temp = stk.top(); stk.pop(); for(int i = 0; i < temp->children.size(); i++) stk.push(temp->children[i]); res.push_back(temp->val); } reverse(res.begin(), res.end()); return res;}

entry.title: 145. Binary Tree Postorder Traversal-Tree-4
entry.content: 问题描述 二叉树的后序遍历 1234567// definition for a binary tree nodestruct TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode *left; TreeNode *right; TreeNode(int x): val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL){}}; 迭代 12345678910111213141516171819202122// Javapublic class TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x){ val = x; }}public List<Integer> postorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ LinkedList<TreeNode> stack = new LinkedList<>(); LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); if(root == null) return output; stack.add(root); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ TreeNode node = stack.pollLast(); output.addFirst(node.val); if(node.left!=null) stack.add(node.left); if(node.right!=null) stack.add(node.right); } return output;} 123456789101112131415161718# Pythonclass TreeNode(object): def __init__(self, x): self.val = x self.left = None self.right = Nonedef postorderTraversal(self, root): if root is None: return [] stack, output = [root, ], [] while stack: root = stack.pop() output.append(root.val) if root.left is not None: stack.append(root.left) if root.right is not None: stack.append(root.right) return output[::-1] time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$ 先序、中序、后序遍历总结 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354// Pre Order Traversalpublic List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> result = new ArrayList<>(); Seque<TreeNode> stack = new ArrayDeque<>(); TreeNode p = root; while(!stack.isEmpty() || p != null){ if(p != null){ stack.push(p); result.add(p.val); p = p.left; } else{ TreeNode node = stack.pop(); p = node.right; } } return result;}// In Order Traversalpublic List<Integer> inorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> result = new ArrayList<>(); Deque<TreeNode> stack = new ArrayDeque<>(); TreeNode p = root; while(!stack.isEmpty() || p != null){ if(p != null){ stack.push(p); p = p.left; } else{ TreeNode node = stack.pop(); result.add(node.val); p = node.right; } } return result;}// Post Order Traversalpublic List<Integer> postorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ LinkedList<Integer> result = new LinkedList<>(); Deque<TreeNode> stack = new ArrayDeque<>(); TreeNode p = root; while(!stack.isEmpty() || p != null){ if(p != null){ stack.push(p); result.addFirst(p.val); // add in the front of list p = p.right; // reverse the process of preorder } else{ TreeNode node = stack.pop(); p = node.left; // reverse the process of preorder } } return result;} C++ Iterative, Recursive and Morris Traversal 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980818283// iterative with a stackvector<int> postorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> nodes; stack<TreeNode*> todo; TreeNode* cur = root; TreeNode* last = NULL; while(cur || !todo.empty()){ if(cur){ todo.push(cur); cur = cur->left; } else { TreeNode* top = todo.top(); if(top->right && (last != top->right)) cur = top->right; else { nodes.push_back(top->val); last = top; todo.pop(); } } } return nodes;}// recursivevector<int> postorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> nodes; postorder(root, nodes); return nodes;}void postorder(TreeNode* root, vector<int>& nodes){ if(!root) return; postorder(root->left, nodes); postorder(root->right, nodes); nodes.push_back(root->val);}// Morris traversalvector<int> postorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> nodes; TreeNode* dummy = new TreeNode(0); dummy->left = root; TreeNode* cur = dummy; while(cur){ if(cur->left){ TreeNode* pre = cur->left; while(pre->right && (pre->right != cur)){ pre = pre->right; } if(!(pre->right)){ pre->right = cur; cur = cur->left; } else { reverseAddNodes(cur->left, pre, nodes); pre->right = NULL; cur = cur->right; } } else { cur = cur->right; } } return nodes;}void reverseNodes(TreeNode* start, TreeNode* end){ if(start == end) return; TreeNode* x = start; TreeNode* y = start->right; TreeNode* z; while(x != end){ z = y->right; y->right = x; x = y; y = z; }}void reverseAddNodes(TreeNode* start, TreeNode* end, vector<int>& nodes){ reverseNodes(start, end); TreeNode* node = end; while(true){ nodes.push_back(node->val); if(node == start) break; node = node->right; } reverseNodes(end, start);}

entry.title: 144. Binary Tree Preorder Traversal-Tree-3
entry.content: 问题描述 二叉树的先序遍历 递归+迭代 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435// recursivepublic List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> pre = new LinkedList<Integer>(); if(root==null) return pre; pre.add(root.val); pre.addAll(preorderTraversal(root.left)); pre.addAll(preorderTraversal(root.right)); return pre;}// recursive with a helperpublic List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> pre = new LinkedList<Integer>(); preHelper(root, pre); return pre;}public void preHelper(TreeNode root, List<Integer> pre){ if(root==null) return; pre.add(root.left, pre); preHelper(root.left, pre); preHelper(root.right, pre);}// iterative with stackpublic List<Integer> preorderIt(TreeNode root){ List<Integer> pre = new LinkedList<Integer>(); if(root == null) return pre; Stack<TreeNode> tovisit = new Stack<TreeNode>(); tovisit.push(root); while(!tovisit.empty()){ TreeNode visiting = tovisit.pop(); pre.add(visiting.val); if(visiting.right != null) tovisit.push(visiting.right); if(visiting.left != null) tovisit.push(visiting.left); } return pre;} 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071// C++ four methods// recursivevector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> v; preTraversal(root, v); return v;}void preTraversal(TreeNode* root, vector<int>& v){ if(!root) return ; v.push_back(root->val); preTraversal(root->left, v); preTraversal(root->right, v);}// iterate using a stackvector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> v; if(!root) return v; TreeNode* temp = root; stack<TreeNode*> s; s.push(root); while(!s.empty()){ temp = s.top(); s.pop(); v.push_back(temp->val); if(temp->right) s.push(temp->right); if(temp->left) s.push(temp->left); }}vector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> v; if(!root) return v; TreeNode* temp = root; stack<TreeNode*> s; while(true){ while(temp){ v.push_back(temp->val); if(temp->right) s.push(temp->right); temp = temp->left; } if(s.empty()) break; temp = s.top(); s.pop(); };}// morris traversal, O(1) spacevector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root){ vector<int> v; if(!root) return v; TreeNode* temp = root, *prev; while(temp){ if(!temp->left){ v.push_back(temp->val); temp = temp->right; } else{ prev = temp->left; while(prev->right && (prev->right != temp)) prev = prev->right; if(!prev->right){ v.push_back(temp->val); prev->right = temp; temp = temp->left; } else{ prev->right = NULL; temp = temp->right; } } } return v;} 迭代 12345678910111213141516171819202122// Javapublic int TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x){ val = x; }}public List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ LinkedList<TreeNode> stack = new LinkedList<>(); LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); if(root == null) return output; stack.add(root); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ TreeNode node = stack.pollLast(); output.add(node.val); if(node.right != null) stack.add(node.right); if(node.left != null) stack.add(node.left); } return output;} 12345678910111213141516171819# Pythonclass TreeNode(object): def __init__(self, x): self.val = x self.left = None self.right = Nonedef preorderTraversal(self, root): if root is None: return [] stack, output = [root, ], [] while stack: root = stack.pop() if root is not None: output.append(root.val) if root.right is not None: stack.append(root.right) if root.left is not None: stack.append(root.left) return output time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$ Morris traversal 主要用来优化空间复杂度。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627// Javapublic List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root){ LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); TreeNode node = root; while(node != null){ if(node.left == null){ output.add(node.val); node = node.right; } else{ TreeNode predecessor = node.left; while((predecessor.right != null) && (predecessor.right != node)){ predecessor = predecessor.right; } if(predecessor.right == null){ output.add(node.val); predecessor.right = node; node = node.left; } else{ predecessor.right = null; node = node.right; } } } return output;} 12345678910111213141516171819# Python def preorderTraversal(self, root): node, output = root, [] while node: if not node.left: output.append(node.val) node = node.right else: predecessor = node.left while predecessor.right and predecessor.right is not node: predecessor = predecessor.right if not predecessor.right: output.append(node.val) predecessor.right = node node = node.left else: predecessor.right = None node = node.right return output time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$

entry.title: 589. N-ary Tree Preorder Traversal-Tree-2
entry.content: 问题描述 N叉树先序遍历 迭代 123456789101112131415161718192021222324// Java// Definition for a nodeclass Node{ public int val; public List<Node> children; public Node(){} public Node(int _val, List<Node> _children){ val = _val; children = _children; }};public List<Integer> preorder(Node root){ LinkedList<Node> stack = new LinkedList<>(); LinkedList<Integer> output = new LinkedList<>(); if(root == null) return output; stack.add(root); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ Node node = stack.pollLast(); output.add(node.val); Collections.reverse(node.children); for(Node item: node.children) stack.add(item); } return output;} 12345678910111213141516# Python# Definition for a nodeclass Node(object): def __init__(self, val, children): self.val = val self.children = childrenclass Solution(object): def preorder(self, root): if root is None: return [] stack, output = [root, ], [] while stack: root = stack.pop() output.append(root.val) stack.extend(root.children[::-1]) return output time: $O(N)$ space: $O(N)$ C++ version 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839// Definition for a nodeclass Node{public: int val; vector<Node*> children; Node(){} Node(int _val, vector<Node*> _children){ val = _val; children = _children; }};// recursivevoid travel(Node* root, vector<int>& result){ if(root == nullptr) return; result.push_back(root->val); for(Node* child: root->child) travel(child, result);}vector<int> preorder(Node* root){ vector<int> result; travel(root, result); return result;}// iterativevector<int> preorder(Node* root){ vector<int> result; if(root == nullptr) return result; stack<Node*> stk; stk.push(root); while(!stk.empty()){ Node* cur = stk.top(); stk.pop(); result.push_back(cur->val); for(int i = cur->children.size()-1; i >= 0; i--){ if(cur->children[i] != nullptr) stk.push(cur->children[i]); } } return result;}

entry.title: 617. Merge Two Binary Trees-Tree-1
entry.content: 问题描述 合并两棵二叉树 方法一：使用递归 123456789101112131415// Javapublic class TreeNode{ int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x){ val = x; }}public TreeNode mergeTrees(TreeNode t1, TreeNode t2){ if(t1 == null) return t2; if(t2 == null) return t1; t1.val += t2.val; t1.left = mergeTrees(t1.left, t2.left); t1.right = mergeTrees(t1.right, t2.right); return t1;} 1234567# Pythondef mergeTrees(self, t1, t2): if not t1 and not t2: return None ans = TreeNode((t1.val if t1 else 0) + (t2.val if t2 else 0)) ans.left = self.mergeTrees(t1 and t1.left, t2 and t2.left) ans.right = self.mergeTrees(t1 and t1.right, t2 and t2.right) return ans time: $O(m)$ space: $O(m)$, average: $O(logm)$ 方法二：使用迭代 123456789101112131415public TreeNode mergeTrees(TreeNode t1, TreeNode t2){ if(t1 == null) return t2; Stack<TreeNode[]> stack = new Stack<>(); stack.push(new TreeNode[]{t1, t2}); while(!stack.isEmpty()){ TreeNode[] t = stack.pop(); if(t[0] == null || t[1] == null) continue; t[0].val += t[1].val; if(t[0].left == null) t[0].left = t[1].left; else stack.push(new TreeNode[] {t[0].left, t[1].left}); if(t[0].right == null) t[0].right = t[1].right; else stack.push(new TreeNode[]{t[0].right, t[1].right}); } return t1;} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$

entry.title: 706. Design HashMap-HT-13
entry.content: 问题描述 设计一个 Hash Map 12345678910111213class MyHashMap{public: MyHashMap(){} void put(int key, int value){} int get(int key){} void remove(int key){}};/*** MyHashMap obj = new MyHashMap();* obj.put(key, value);* int param_2 = obj.get(key);* obj.remove(key);*/ 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647// JavaclassMyHashMap{ final Bucket[] buckets = new Bucket[10000]; public void put(int key, int value){ int i = idx(key); if(bucket[i] == null) bucket[i] = new Bucket(); ListNode prev = find(buckets[i], key); if(prev.next == null) prev.next = new ListNode(key, value); else prev.next.val = value; } public int get(int key){ int i = idx(key); if(buckets[i] == null) return -1; ListNode node = find(buckets[i], key); return node.next == null?-1:node.next.val; } public void remove(int key){ int i = idx(key); if(buckets[i] == null) return; ListNode prev = find(buckets[i], key); if(prev.next == null) return; prev.next = prev.next.next; } int idx(int key){ return Integer.hashCode(key) % buckets.length;} ListNode find(Bucket bucket, int key){ ListNode node = bucket.head, prev = null; While(node != null && node.key != key){ prev = node; node = node.next; } return prev; }}class Bucket{ final ListNode head = new ListNode(-1, -1);}class ListNode{ int key, val; ListNode next; ListNode(int key, int val){ this.key = key; this.val = val; }} 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930// C++class MyHashMap(const static int size = 1000;std::array<vector<int>, size> vv;public: MyHashMap(){} void put(const int key, const int value){ int x = key / size; int y = key % size; if(vv[s].empty()){ vv[x] = vector<int>(size+1, -1); vv[x][size] = 0; } vv[x][y] = value; vv[x][size]++; } int get(const int key){ int x = key/size; int y = key%size; if(vv[x].empty() || vv[x][y] == -1) return -1; return vv[x][y]; } void remove(const int key){ int x = key/size; int y = key%size; if(vv[x].empty() || vv[x][y]==-1) return ; vv[x][y] = -1; if(--vv[x][size] == 0) vv[x].clear(); }) 123456789101112131415161718// C++ using vectorclass MyHashMap{public: MyHashMap(){ vec = std::vector<int>(1000001, -1); } void put(int key, int value){ vec[key] = value; } int get(int key){ return vec[key]; } void remove(int key){ vec[key] = -1; }private: std::vector<int> vec;}

entry.title: 242. Valid Anagram-HT-12
entry.content: 问题描述 anagram: 字谜。确定一个字符串是不是另外一个字符串的字谜（他的排列形式） 方法一：排序 12345678public boolean isAnagram(String s, String t){ if(s.length() != t.length()) return false; char[] str1 = s.toCharArray(); char[] str2 = t.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(str1); Arrays.sort(str2); return Arrays.equals(str1, str2);} time: $O(nlogn)$ space: $O(1)$ 方法二：Hash Table 123456789101112// Javapublic boolean isAnagram(String s, String t){ if(s.length() != t.length()) return false; int[] counter = new int[26]; for(int i = 0; i < s.length; i++){ counter[s.charAt(i)-'a']++; counter[t.charAt(i)-'a']--; } for(int count: counter) if(count) return false; return true;} 12345678910111213// C++bool isAnagram(string s, string t){ if(s.length() != t.length()) return false; int n = s.length(); unordered_map<char, int> counts; for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){ counts[s[i]]++; counts[t[i]]--; } for(auto count: counts) if(count.second) return false; return true;}

entry.title: 349. Interection of Two Arrays-HT-11
entry.content: 问题描述 给两个数组，找出他们公有的元素。 解法 12345678910vector<int> intersection(vector<int>& nums1, vector<int>& nums2){ unordered_set<int> m(nums1.begin(), nums1.end()); vector<int> res; for(auto a: nums2) if(m.count(a)){ res.push_back(a); m.erase(a); } return res;}

entry.title: 690. Employee Importance-HT-10
entry.content: 问题描述 给定一个员工的数据结构，包括他特有的id和重要度和他直接下属的id。找出某一个员工及其下属的中重要度。 12345678910111213141516171819202122// Employee infoclass Employee{public: int id; int importance; vector<int> subordinates;}// use depth-first search// JavaMap<Integer, Employee> emap;public int getImportance(List<Employee> employees, int queryid){ emap = new HashMap(); for(Employee e: employees) emap.put(e.id, e); return dfs(queryid);}public int dfs(int eid){ Employee employee = emap.get(eid); int ans = employee.importance; for(Integer subid: employee.subordinates) ans += dfs(subid); return ans;} 1234567# Pythondef getImportance(self, employee, query_id): emap = {e.id: e for e in employees} def dfs(eid): employee = emap[eid] return (employee.importance+sum(dfs(eid) for eid in employee.subordinates)) return dfs(query_id) 12345678910111213// C++int getImportance(vector<Employee*> employees, int id){ unordered_map<int, Employee*> map; for(const auto element: employees) map[element->id] = element; return help(map, id);}int help(unordered_map<int, Employee*>& map, const int id){ auto sum = map[id]->importance; for(const auto element: map[id]->subordinates) sum += help(map, element); return sum;} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$

entry.title: 389. Find the Difference-HT-9
entry.content: 问题描述 两个字符串只有小写字母，其中一个是有另一个随机排序并在随机位置上增加的一个字母，问新增加的字母是什么？ 解法 1234567// bit manipulationchar findTheDifference(string s, string t){ char r = 0; for(char c:s) r ^= c; for(char c:t) r ^= c; return r;} 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425# Python # dictdef findTheDifference(self, s, t): dic = {} for ch in s: dic[ch] = dic.get(ch, 0) + 1 for ch in t: if dic.get(ch, 0) == 0: return ch else: dic[ch] -= 1# differencedef findTheDifference(self, s, t): diff = 0 for i in range(len(s)): diff -= ord(s[i]) diff += ord(t[i]) diff += ord(t[-1]) return chr(diff)# xordef findTheDifference(self, s, t): code = 0 for ch in s+t: code ^= ord(ch) return chr(code)

entry.title: 748. Shorest Completing Word-HT-8
entry.content: 问题描述 找到最短的且含有模板中所有字母的单词。 解法 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728// Javapublic String shortestCompletingWord(String licensePlate, String[] words){ String target = licensePlate.toLowerCase(); int[] charMap = new int[26]; for(int i = 0; i < target.length(); i++) if(Character.isLetter(target.charAt(i))) charMap[target.charAt(i)-'a']++; int minLength = Integer.MAX_VALUE; String result = null; for(int i = 0; i < words.length; i++){ String word = words[i].toLowerCase(); if(matches(word, charMap) && word.length() < minLength){ minLength = word.length(); result = words[i]; } } return result;}private boolean matches(String word, int[] charMap){ int[] targetMap = nre int[26]; for(int i = 0; i < word.length(); i++) if(Character.isLetter(word.charAt(i))) targetMap[word.charAt(i)-'a']++; for(int i = 0; i < 26; i++) if(charMap[i]!=0 && target<ap[i] < charMap[i]) return false; return true;} 123456789101112131415161718192021// C++string shortestCompletingWord(string s, vector<string>& words){ std::transform(s.begin(), s.end(), s.begin(), ::tolower); map<char, int> counts; int total = 0; for(char c: s) if(isalpha(c)){ counts[c]++; total++; } string res; for(string w: words){ int n = total; map<char, int> cnts = counts; for(int i = 0; i < w.size(); i++) n -= (cnts[w[i]]--) > 0; if(n==0 && (res.empty() || w.size() < res.size())) res = w; } return res;}

entry.title: 136. Single Number-HT-7
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个非空的整数数组，除了一个元素出现了一次之外每个元素都出现了两次。找出那个只出现一次的元素。 方法一：List operation 12345678def singleNumber(self, nums): no_duplicate_list = [] for i in nums: if i not in no_duplicate_list: no_duplicate_list.append(i) else: no_duplicate_list.remove(i) return no_duplicate_list.pop() time: $O(n^2)$ space: $O(n)$ 方法二：Hash Table 12345678def singleNumber(self, nums): hash_table = [] for i in nums: try: hash_table.pop(i) except: hash_table[i] = 1 return hash_table.popitem()[0] time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$ 方法三：数学 $$ 2 \times (a+b+c) - (a+a+b+b+c) = c $$ 12def singleNUmber(self, nums): return 2*sum(set(nums)) - sum(nums) time: $O(n+n)=O(n)$, see it as sum(list(i for i in nums) space: $O(n+n)=O(n)$ 方法四：位操作 12345def singleNumber(self, nums): a = 0 for i in nums: a ^= i return a time: $O(n)$ space: $O(1)$

entry.title: 575. Distribute Candies-HT-6
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个长度为偶数的整数数组，不同的数字代表不同类型的糖果。将糖果均分给哥哥姐姐，问姐姐可以得到的糖果种类总数最大是多少？ 方法一：暴力 生成糖果的所有排列，然后确定前半个数组中的种类个数。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324// Javaint max_kind = 0;public int distributeCandies(int[] nums){ permute(nums, 0); return max_kind;}public void permute(int[] nums, int l){ if(l == nums.length-1){ HashSet<Integer> set = new HashSet<>(); for(int i = 0; i < nums.length/2; i++) set.add(nums[i]); max_kind = Math.max(max_kind, set.size()); } for(int i = l; i < nums.length; i++){ swap(nums, i, l); permute(nums, l+1); swap(nums, i, l); }}public void swap(int[] nums, int x, int y){ int temp = nums[x]; nums[x] = nums[y]; nums[y] = temp;} time: $O(n!)$ space: $O(n)$ 方法二：更好的暴力 观察到姐姐最多可以拿到的种类数是 n/2，对于种类数少于 n/2 的情况，我们可以把所有种类数的糖果都给姐姐。所以我们遍历数组，找出糖果的种类总数。 12345678910111213// Javapublic int distributeCandies(int[] candies){ int count = 0; for(int i = 0; i < candies.length && count < candies.length/2; i++){ if(candies[i] != Integer.MIN_VALUE){ count++; for(int j = i+1; j < candies.length; j++) if(candies[j] == candies[i]) candies[j] == Integer.MIN_VALUE; } } return count;} time: $O(n^2)$ space: $O(1)$ 方法三：使用排序 12345678public int distributeCandies(int[] candies){ Array.sort(candies); int count = 1; for(int i = 1; i < candies.length && count < candies.length/2; i++) if(candies[i] > candies[i-1]) count++; return count;} time: $O(nlogn)$ space: $O(1)$ 方法四：使用 set 1234567public int distributeCandies(int[] candies){ HashSet<Integer> set = new HashSet<>(); for(int candy: candies){ set.add(candy); } return Math.min(set.size(), candies.length/2);} 12345678910111213141516171819202122// C++int distributeCandies(vector<int>& candies){ unordered_set<int> kinds; for(int kind: candies) kinds.insert(kind); return min(kinds.size(), candies.size()/2);}int distributeCandies(vector<int>& candies){ return min(unordered_set<int>(begin(c), end(c)).size(), c.size()/2);}int distributeCandies(vector<int>& candies){ bitset<200001> hash; int count = 0; for(int i: candies){ if(!hash.test(i+100000)){ count++; hash.set(i+100000); } } int n = candies.size(); return min(count, n/2);} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$

entry.title: 463 Island Perimeter-HT-5
entry.content: 问题描述 perimeter:周长。给一个二维数组，1代表陆地，0代表海洋。格子是水平或者垂直连接的。确定岛的周长 解法 找到陆地总数，再找到重复边的个数。 12345678910111213int islandPerimeter(vector<vector<int>>& grid){ int count = 0, repeat = 0; for(int i = 0; i < grid.size(); i++){ for(int j = 0; j < grid[i].size(); j++){ if(grid[i][j] == 1){ count++; if(i!=0&&grid[i-1][j]==1) repeat++; if(j!=0&&grid[i][j-1]==1) repeat++; } } } return 4*count-repeat*2;}

entry.title: 884. Uncommon Words from Two Sentences-HT-4
entry.content: 问题描述 给两个句子，句子由单词以及单词间的空格构成，每个单词只有小写形式。一个不常见的单词只出现在所有的句子中一次，找出所有的不常见单词。 解法 12345678910111213// Javapublic String[] uncommonFromSentences(String A, String B){ Map<String, Integer> count = new HashMap(); for(String word: A.split(" ")) count.put(word, count.getOrDefault(word, 0)+1); for(String word: B.split(" ")) count.put(word, count.getOrDefault(word, 0)+1); List<String> ans = new LinkedList(); for(String word: count.keySet()) if(count.get(word) == 1) ans.add(word); return ans.toArray(new String[ans.size()]);} 1234567891011# Pythondef uncommonFromSentences(self, A, B): count = {} for word in A.split(): count[word] = count.get(word, 0) + 1 for word in B.split(): count[word] = count.get(word, 0) + 1 # Alternatively: # count = collections.Counter(A.split()) # count += collections.Counter(B.split()) return [word for word in count if count[word] == 1] 1234567891011// C++vector<string> uncommonFromSentences(string A, string B){ unordered_map<string, int> count; istringstream iss(A + " " + B); while(iss >> A) count[A]++; vector<string> res; for(auto w: count) if(w.second == 1) res.push_back(w.first); return res;}

entry.title: 500. Keyboard Row-HT-3
entry.content: 问题描述 给一列表的单词，只返回那些可以用键盘上的一行字母打出来的单词。 实现 123456789# Pythondef findWords(self, words): line1, line2, line3 = set('qwertyuiop'), set('asdfghjkl'), set('zxcvbnm') ret = [] for word in words: w = set(word.lower()) if w.issubset(line1) or w.issubset(line2) or w.issubset(line3): ret.append(word) return ret 1234567891011121314151617// C++vector<string> findWords(vector<string>& words){ vector<int> dict(26); vector<string> rows = {"QWERTYUIOP", "ASDFGHJKL", "ZXCVBNM"}; for(int i = 0; i < rows.size(); i++) for(auto c: rows[i]) dict[c-'A'] = 1<<i; vector<string> res; for(auto w: words){ int r = 7; for(char c: w){ r &= dict[toupper(c)-'A']; if(r==0) break; } if(r) res.push_back(w); } return res;}

entry.title: 811. Subdomain Visit Count-HT-2
entry.content: 问题描述 子域名访问的次数。当访问一个域名时，他的众多子域名也会被访问。 问给一个有很多要访问的域名以及访问的次数，问对于各子域名都需要访问多少次？ 解法 使用 Hash Map，对于 a.b.c，数的是 a.b.c b.c c 123456789101112131415161718// Javapublic List<String> subdomainVisits(String[] cpdomains){ Map<String, Integer> counts = new HashMap(); for(String domain: cpdomains){ String[] cpinfo = domain.split("\\s+"); String[] frags = cpinfo[1].split("\\."); int count = Integer.valueOf(cpinfo[0]); String cur = ""; for(int i = frags.length-1; i >= 0; i--){ cur = frags[i] + (i < frags.length-1?".":"") + cur; counts.put(cur, counts.getOrDefault(cur, 0)+count); } } List<String> ans = new ArrayList(); for(String dom: counts.keySet()) ans.add(""+counts.get(dom)+" "+dom); return ans;} 12345678910# Pythondef subdomainVisits(self, cpdomains): ans = collections.Counter() for domain in cpdomains: count, domain = domain.split() count = int(count) frags = domain.split('.') for i in xrange(len(frags)): ans[".".join(frags[i:])] += count return ["{} {}".format(ct, dom) for dom, ct in ans.items()] 12345678910111213141516// C++vector<string> subdomainVisits(vector<string>& cpdomains){ unordered_map<string, int> c; for(auto cd: cpdomains){ int i = cd.find(" "); int n = stoi(cd.substr(0,i)); string s = cd.substr(i+1, cd.size()-i-1); for(int i = 0; i < s.size(); i++) if(s[i] == '.') c[s.substr(i+1, s.size()-i)] += n; c[s] += n; } vector<string> res; for(auto k: c) res.push_back(to_string(k.second)+" "+k.first); return res;}

entry.title: 771 Jewels and Stones-HT-1
entry.content: 问题描述 有一个字符串 J 来表示珠宝，用字符串 S 来表示石头。 S 中的每一个字符都是你拥有的一种石头，你想知道这些石头里面有多少是珠宝。 解法 用 J 来建立一个 hash set，读 S 来数珠宝的数量。 1234567// C++int numJewelsInStones(string J, string S){ int res = 0; unordered_set<char> setJ(J.begin(), J.end()); for(char s: S) if(setJ.count(s)) res++; return res;} 123456789101112// Javapublic int numJewelsInstones(String J, String S){ int res = 0; Set setJ = new HashSet(); for(char j: J.toCharArray()) setJ.add(); for(char s: S.toCharArray()) if(setJ.contains(s)) res++; return res;}# Pythondef numJewelsInStones(self, J, S): setJ = set(J) return sum(s in setJ for s in S) time: $O(M+N)$(use O(1) to check if it contains an element) space: $O(M)$

entry.title: 300. Longest Increasing Subsequence-DP-12
entry.content: 问题描述 寻找一个序列中的最长上升子序列 方法一：暴力 123456789101112public int lengthOfLIS(int[] nums){ return lengthofLIS(nums, Integer.MIN_VALUE, 0);}public int lengthofLIS(int[] nums, int prev, int curpos){ if(curpos == nums.length) return 0; int taken = 0; if(nums[curpos] > prev){ taken = 1 + lengthofLIS(nums, nums[curpos], curpos+1); } int nottaken = lengthofLIS(nums, nums[curpos], curpos+1); return Math.max(taken, nottaken);} time: $O(2^n)$, space: $O(n^2)$ 方法二：带记忆的递归 12345678910111213141516public int lengthOfLIS(int[] nums){ int memo[][] = new int[nums.length + 1][nums.length]; for(int[] l: memo) Arrays.fill(l, -1); return lengthofLIS(nums, -1, 0, memo);}public int lengthofLIS(int[] nums, int precindex, int curpos, int[][] memo){ if(curpos == nums.length) return 0; if(memo[previndex+1][curpos] >= 0) return memo[previndex+1][curpos]; int taken = 0; if(previndex < 0 || nums[curpos] > nums[previndex]){ taken = 1 + lengthofLIS(nums, curpos, curpos+1, memo); } int nottaken = lengthofLIS(nums, previndex, curpos+1, memo); memo[previndex+1][curpos] = Math.max(taken, nottaken); return memo[previndex+1][curpos];} time: $O(n^2)$, space: $O(n^2)$ 方法三：动态规划 12345678910111213141516public int lengthOfLIS(int[] nums){ if(nums.length == 0) return 0; int[] dp = new int[nums.length]; dp[0] = 1; int maxans = 1; for(int i = 1; i < dp.length; i++){ int maxval = 0; for(int j = 0; j < i; j++){ if(nums[i] > nums[j]) maxval = Math.max(maxval, dp[j]); } dp[i] = maxval + 1; maxans = Math.max(maxans, dp[i]); } return maxans;} time: $O(n^2)$, space: $O(n)$ 方法四：使用了二分搜索的动态规划 1234567891011public int lengthOfLIS(int[] nums){ int[] dp = new int[nums.length]; int len = 0; for(int num: nums){ int i = Arrays.binarySearch(dp, 0, len, num); if(i < 0) i = -(i+1); dp[i] = num; if(i == len) len++; } return len;} time: $O(nlogn)$, space: $O(n)$

entry.title: 714. Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Transaction Fee-DP-11
entry.content: 问题描述 带手续费的买卖股票最佳时间。可以买卖多次，但是买之前必须先卖出已经有的。手续费只在卖的时候收。 问最大的盈利可以是多少？ 动态规划 在第i天结束的时候，用 cash 来表示我们手上没有股票的时候拥有的最大利润，用 hold 来表示我们手上有股票时拥有的最大利润。对于 cash 变量而言，有两种情况 我们前一天手上就没有股票，那么我们今天也不再买，这样就保持了手上没有股票，该利润用 cash 来表示。即 cash = cash 我们前一天手上是有股票的，为了满足 cash 这个变量的要求（它只表示手上没有股票时的最大利润），我们在今天必须卖出，由于前一天手上是有股票的，所以前一天的最大利润用 hold 表示，这样 cash = hold + prices[i] - fee 我们的目标是利润最大化，所以： cash = max(cash, hold + prices[i] - fee)。 对于 hold 变量而言，也有两种情况： 我们前一天手上就有股票，那么今天保留股票就可以满足要求：hold = hold 我们前一天没有股票，为了手上能够有股票，我们需要在这一天买入，而因为前一天手上没有股票，所以前一天的利润用 cash 来表示。故：hold = cash - prices[i] 目标是利润最大化，故： hold = max(hold, cash - prices[i]) 1234567# Pythondef maxProfit(self, prices, fee): cash, hold = 0, -prices[0] for i in range(1, len(prices)): cash = max(cash, hold + prices[i] - fee) hold = max(hold, cash - prices[i]) return cash 123456789// Javapublic int maxProfit(int[] prices, int fee){ int cash = 0, hold = -prices[0]; for(int i = 1; i < prices.length; i++){ cash = Math.max(cash, hold + prices[i] - fee); hold = Math.max(hold, cash - prices[i]); } return cash;} time: $O(N)$, space: $O(1)$

entry.title: 712. Minimum ASCII Delete Sum for Two Strings-DP-10
entry.content: 问题描述 给两个字符串，两边各删除一些字符使得两个字符串最终能够相等，问删除的字符ASCII之和最小是多少？ 动态规划 用 dp[i][j] 表示对于 s1[i:] 和 s2[j:] 的解。 其中一个字符串为空时，答案是另一个字符串的 ASCII 总和： $$ dp[i][s2.length()] = dp[i+1][s2.length()] + s1.codePointAt(i) $$ 如果 s1[i] == s2[j]，有 dp[i][j] = dp[i+1][j+1]。 如果 s1[i] != s2[j]，需要进行删除 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132def minimumDeleteSum(self, s1, s2): dp = [[0] * (len(s2)+1) for _ in xrange(len(s1)+1)] for i in xrange(len(s1) - 1, -1, -1): dp[i][len(s2)] = dp[i+1][len(s2)] + ord(s1[i]) for j in xrange(len(s2) - 1, -1, -1): dp[len(s1)][j] = dp[len(s1)[j+1]] + ord(s2[j]) for i in xrange(len(s1) - 1, -1, -1): for j in xrange(len(s1) - 1, -1, -1): if s1[i] == s2[j]: dp[i][j] = dp[i+1][j+1] else: dp[i][j] = min(dp[i+1][j] + ord(s1[i]), dp[i][j+1] + ord(s2[j])) return dp[0][0] // C++ versionint minimumDeleteSum(string s1, string s2) { int len1 = s1.size(); int len2 = s2.size(); vector<vector<int>> dp(len1+1, vector<int>(len2+1, 0)); for(int i = len1-1; i >= 0; i--) dp[i][len2] = dp[i+1][len2] + s1[i]; for(int j = len2-1; j >= 0; j--) dp[len1][j] = dp[len1][j+1] + s2[j]; for(int i = len1-1; i >= 0; i--) for(int j = len2-1; j >= 0; j--){ if(s1[i] == s2[j]) dp[i][j] = dp[i+1][j+1]; else dp[i][j] = min(dp[i+1][j]+s1[i], dp[i][j+1]+s2[j]); } return dp[0][0];} time: $O(M*N)$, where M, N are the lengths of the given strings. space: $O(M*N)$

entry.title: 647. Palindromic Substrings-DP-9
entry.content: 问题描述 数一下一个字符串中回文子串的个数 方法一：在中心扩张 枚举所有可能为回文子串中心的下标。注意区分奇数长度和偶数长度。 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728public int countSubstrings(String S){ int N = S.length(), ans = 0; for(int center = 0; center <= 2*N-1; center++){ int left = center/2; int right = left + center%2; // 用来处理奇偶 while(left >= 0 && right < N && S.charAt(left) == S.charAt(right)){ ans++; left--; right++; } } return ans;}// 另一种写法int count = 0;public int countSubstring(String s){ if(s==null || s.length() == 0) return 0; for(int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++){ extendPalindrome(s, i, i); // odd length extendPalindrome(s, i, i+1); // even length } return count;}private void extendPalindrome(String s, int left, int right){ while(left >= 0 && right < s.length() && s.charAt(left) == s.charAt(right)){ count++; left--; right++; }} time: $O(n^2)$, space: $O(1)$ 方法二：Manacher's Algorithm 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526public int countSubstrings(String S){ char[] A = new char[2 * S.length() + 3]; A[0] = '@'; A[1] = '#'; A[A.length-1] = '$'; int t = 2; for(char c: S.toCharArray()){ A[t++] = c; A[t++] = '#'; } int[] Z = new int[A.length]; int center = 0, right = 0; for(int i = 1; i < Z.length-1; i++){ if(i < right) Z[i] = Math.min(right-i, Z[2*center-i]); while(A[i + Z[i] + 1] == A[i - Z[i] - 1]) Z[i]++; if(i + Z[i] > right){ center = i; right = i + Z[i]; } } int ans = 0; for(int v: Z) ans += (v+1)/2; // for v is the longest // polindromic substring centered at C, then the substrings // with radius R-1, R-2 ... 0, also form polindrome} time: $O(N)$, space: $O(N)$

entry.title: 413. Arithmetic Slices-DP-8
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组，找出其中可以切分出的算术级数序列的个数 方法一：暴力 枚举所有可能出现的情况。 1234567891011121314public int numberOfArithmeticSlices(int[] A){ int count = 0; for(int s = 0; s < A.length-2; s++){ // s denotes start int d = A[s+1] - A[s]; for(int e = s+2; e < A.length; e++){ // e denotes end int i = 0; for(i = s+1; i <= e; i++) if(A[i] - A[i-1] != d) break; if(i > e) count++; } } return count;} time: $O(n^3)$, space: $O(1)$ 方法二：暴力优化 之前的方法在检查[s,e+1]时还要再重复[s,e]中的部分，所以是多余的，可以进行优化： 123456789public int numberOfArithmeticSlices(int[] A){ int count = 0; for(int s = 0; s < A.length - 2; s++) int d = A[s+1] - A[s]; for(int e = s+2; e < A.length; e++) if(A[e] - A[e - 1] == d) count++; else break; return count;} time: $O(n^2)$, space: $O(1)$ 方法三：使用递归 123456789101112131415int sum = 0;public int numberOfArithmeticSlices(int[] A){ slices(A, A.length - 1); return sum;}public int slices(int[] A, int i){ if(i < 2) return 0; int ap = 0; if(A[i] - A[i-1] == A[i-1] - A[i-2]){ ap = 1 + slices(A, i-1); sum += ap; } else slices(A, i-1); return ap;} time: $O(n)$, space: $O(n)$ 方法四：动态规划 dp[i]表示(k,j)范围内可能的切片数量。k在满足(k,j)形成算术级数时尽可能小。 1234567891011public int numberOfArithmeticSlices(int[] A){ int[] dp = new int[A.length]; int sum = 0; for(int i = 2; i < dp.length; i++){ if(A[i] - A[i-1] == A[i-1] - A[i-2]){ dp[i] = 1+dp[i-1]; sum += dp[i]; } } return sum;} time: $O(n)$, space: $O(n)$ 123456789101112// 可改进为只用一个变量，因为每次循环只用了dp[i-1]public int numberOfArithmeticSlices(int[] A){ int dp = 0; int sum = 0; for(int i = 2; i < A.length; i++){ if(A[i] - A[i-1] == A[i-1] - A[i-2]){ dp = 1 + dp; sum += dp; } else dp = 0; } return sum;} time: $O(n)$, space: $O(1)$ 方法六：使用公式 可以观察到，对于连续发现k个间距相同的元素时，我们对总和依次加上了1,2,3,...k，所以每当数到一个连续时，给count变量加上1，当发现不连续时，在总和里面直接加上 $count*(count+1)/2$ 123456789101112public int numberOfArithmeticSlices(int[] A){ int count = 0; int sum = 0; for(int i = 2; i < A.length; i++){ if(A[i] - A[i-1] == A[i-1] - A[i-2]) count++; else{ sum += (count+1)*count/2; count = 0; } } return sum += (count+1)*count/2;}

entry.title: 877. Stone Game-DP-7
entry.content: 问题描述 有偶数摞石块，第i摞用 piles[i] 来表示。石块的总数是奇数，两个人轮流取一摞石块，问到最后第一个取石块的人是否永远拥有一个可以胜出的策略？ 动态规划 dp(i, j) 表示当剩余的石头堆为 piles[i],...piles[j] 时可以得到的最大分数（这个分数指的是A得到的分数减去B得到的分数，对于A来讲，他如果想赢的话，就要让这个分数最大，对于B来讲，他要让这个分数最小）。对于 A ，我们要让这个分数最大： $$ dp(i, j) = max(piles[i] + dp(i+1, j), piles[j] + dp(i, j-1)) $$ 对于 B，我们要让这个分数最小（B拿的石块会减小总分数）： $$ dp(i, j) = min(-piles[i] + dp(i+1, j), -piles[j] + dp(i, j-1)) $$ 123456789101112131415bool stoneGame(vector<int>& piles){ int N = piles.size(); // dp[i+1][j+1] = the value of the game [piles[i]...piles[j]] int dp[N+2][N+2]; memset(dp, 0, sizeof(dp)); for(int size = 1; size <= N; size++) for(int i = 0, j = size-1; j < N; i++, j++){ int parity = (j-i-N) % 2; if(parity) dp[i+1][j+1] = max(piles[i]+dp[i+2][j+1], piles[j]+dp[i+1][j]); else dp[i+1][j+1] = min(-piles[i]+dp[i+2][j+1], -piles[j]+dp[i+1][j]); } return dp[1][N] > 0;}

entry.title: 338. Counting Bits-DP-6
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数字num，对于所有的在 [0, num] 范围内的数字 i，计算他们二进制形式中1的个数，返回为一个数组。 如： 12输入：2输出：[0,1,1] 思路 递推方程为： $$ f[i] = f[i/2] + i%2 $$ 12345678vector<int> countBits(int num){ vector<int> ans; ans.push_back(0); for(int i = 1; i <= num; i++){ ans.push_back(ans[i/2] + i%2); } return ans;} 123456789101112131415161718192021// 直接判断vector<int> countBits(int num) { vector<int> ans; for(int i = 0; i <= num; i++){ int c = 0, a = i; while(a){ a &= a-1; c++; } ans.push_back(c); } return ans;}// 另外一种解法vector<int> countBits(int num) { vector<int> ans; ans.push_back(0); for(int i = 1; i <= num; i++) ans.push_back(ans[i&(i-1)] + 1); return ans;}

entry.title: 303. Range Sum Query-Immutable-DP-5
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组，给一个下标范围，求范围内数组的和。 方法一：暴力 12345678910private int[] data;public NumArray(int[] nums){ data = nums;}public int sumRange(int i, int j){ int sum = 0; for(int k = i; k <= j; k++) sum += data[k]; return sum;} time: O(n), space: O(1) (data is a reference to nums and is not a copy of it) 方法二：Caching 12345678910111213private Map<Pair<Integer, Integer>, Integer> map = new HashMap<>();public NumArray(int[] nums){ for(int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++){ int sum = 0; for(int j = i; j < nums.length; j++){ sum += nums[j]; map.put(Pair.create(i, j), sum); } }}public int sumRange(int i, int j){ return map.get(Pair.create(i, j));} time: $O(1)$ time per query, $O(n^2)$ time pre-computation, space: $O(n^2)$ 方法三：Caching 1234567891011// sum[k] 是 nums[0...k-1] 的和// sumRange(i, j) = sum[j+1] - sum[i]private int[] sum;public NumArray(int[] nums){ sum = new int[nums.length+1]; for(int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) sum[i+1] = sum[i] + nums[i];}public int sumRange(int i, int j){ return sum[j+1] - sum[i];} time: $O(1)$ time per query, $O(n)$ time pre-computation space: $O(n)$ 123456789101112131415// C++class NumArray {private: vector<int> sum;public: NumArray(vector<int> nums) { sum.push_back(0); for(int& num: nums) sum.push_back(sum.back() + num); } int sumRange(int i, int j) { return sum[j+1] - sum[i]; }};

entry.title: 198. House Robber-DP-4
entry.content: 问题描述 抢劫房子，数组中表示的是每一个房子里的财产，不能抢劫连续的两座房子，问怎么抢劫才能收益最高？ 第一步：找到递归关系 对于i个房子而言，他可以选择抢或者不抢，选择抢的话，就不能抢前一个，只能抢两个以前的房子，如果不抢的话，就可以抢一个以前的房子，故有递推关系： $$ rob(i) = max(rob(i-2)+currentHouseValue, rob(i-1) $$ 第二步：递归版（自顶向下top-down） 1234567public int rob(int[] nums){ return rob(nums, nums.length-1);}private int rob(int[] nums, int i){ if(i < 0) return 0; return Math.max(rob(nums, i-2) + nums[i], rob(nums, i-1));} 第三步：递归+记忆（memo top-down） 12345678910111213int[] memo;public int rob(int[] nums){ memo = new int[nums.length + 1]; Arrays.fill(memo, -1); return rob(nums, nums.length-1);}private int rob(int[] nums, int i){ if(i < 0) return 0; if(memo[i] >= 0) return memo[i]; int result = Math.max(rob(nums, i-2)+nums[i], rob(nums, i-1)); memo[i] = result; return result;} time: O(n), space: O(n) 第四步：迭代+记忆（memo bottom-up） 1234567891011public int rob(int[] nums){ if(nums.length == 0) return 0; int[] memo = new int[nums.length+1]; memo[0] = 0; memo[1] = nums[0]; for(int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++){ int val = nums[i]; memo[i+1] = Math.max(memo[i], memo[i-1] + val); } return memo[nums.length];} 第五步：迭代+2变量（bottom-up） 12345678910111213// 因为在上一种方法中我们实际上每次迭代只使用了 memo[i] 和 memo[i-1]// the order is: prev2, prev1, numpublic int rob(int[] nums){ if(nums.length == 0) return 0; int prev1 = 0; int prev2 = 0; for(int num : nums){ int tmp = prev1; prev1 = Math.max(prev2 + num, prev1); prev2 = tmp; } return prev1;}

entry.title: 53. Maximum Subarray-DP-3
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组，找出和最大的子数组。 思路 找递推公式： dp[i] = A[i] + max(dp[i-1], 0) 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435int maxSubArray(vector<int>& nums){ int n = nums.size(); vector<int> dp(n, 0); dp[0] = nums[0]; int m = dp[0]; for(int i = 1; i < n; i++){ dp[i] = nums[i] + max(dp[i-1], 0); m = max(m, dp[i]); } return m;}// use only one variableint maxSubArray(vector<int>& nums){ int n = nums.size(); int dp = nums[0]; int m = dp; for(int i = 1; i < n; i++){ dp = nums[i] + max(dp, 0); m = max(m, dp[i]); // alternatively: // if(dp < 0) dp = 0; // dp += nums[i] // if(dp > m) m = dp; } return m;}// another kind of interpretationint max_ending_here = nums[0];int max_so_far = nums[0];for(int i = 1; i < nums.size(); i++){ if(max_ending_here < 0) max_ending_here = 0; max_ending_here += nums[i]; if(max_ending_here > max_so_far) max_so_far = max_ending_here;}return max_so_far;

entry.title: 70. Climbing Stairs-DP-2
entry.content: 问题描述 爬一个n阶的楼梯，每次只能爬1级或两级，问有几种爬法？ 方法一：暴力法 12345678public int climbStairs(int n){ climb_Stairs(0, n);}public int climb_Stairs(int i, int n){ if(i > n) return 0; if(i == n) return 1; return climb_Stairs(i+1, n) + climb_Stairs(i+2,n);} time: $O(2^n)$, space: $O(n)$ 方法二：Recursion with memorization 123456789101112// Javapublic int climbStairs(int n){ int memop[] = new int[n+1]; return climb_Stairs(0, n, memo);}oublic int climb_Stairs(int i, int n, int memo[]){ if(i > n) return 0; if(i == n) return 1; if(memo[i] > 0) return memo[i]; memo[i] = climb_Stairs(i+1, n, memo) + climb_Stairs(i+2, n, memo); return memo[i];} time: $O(n)$, space: $O(n)$ 方法三：动态规划 dp[i] = dp[i-1] + dp[i-2] 12345678910// Javapublic int climbStairs(int n){ if(n == 1) return 1; int[] dp = new int[n+1]; dp[1] = 1; dp[2] = 2; for(int i = 3; i <= n; i++) dp[i] = dp[i-1] + dp[i-2]l return dp[n];} time: $O(n)$, space: $O(n)$ 方法四：Fibonacci 数 1234567891011public int climbStairs(int n){ if(n == 1) return 1; int first = 1; int second = 2; for(int i = 3; i <= n; i++){ int third = first + second; first = second; second = third; } return second;} time: $O(n)$, space: $O(1)$ 方法五：Binets Method 利用 $$ \left[ \begin{matrix} F_{n+1} & F_{n} \ F_{n} & F_{n-1} \end{matrix} \right] = \left[ \begin{matrix} 1 & 1 \ 1 & 0 \end{matrix} \right] \cdot \left[ \begin{matrix} F_{n} & F_{n-1} \ F_{n-1} & F_{n-2} \end{matrix} \right] \tag{1} $$ 123456789101112131415161718192021public int climbStairs(int n){ int[][] q = {{1,1}, {1,0}}; int[][] res = pow(q, n); return res[0][0];}public int[][] pow(int[][] a, int n){ int[][] ret = {{1,0}, {0,1}}; while(n > 0){ if((n&1) == 1) ret = multiply(ret, a); n >>= 1; a = multiply(a, a); } return ret;}public int[][] multiply(int[][] a, int[][] b){ int[][] c = new int[2][2]; for(int i = 0; i < 2; i++) for(int j = 0; j < 2; j++) c[i][j] = a[i][0]*b[0][j] + a[i][1]*b[1][j]; return c;} time: $O(log(n))$, space: $O(1)$ 方法六：Fibonacci Formula 利用公式： $$ F_n = \frac{1}{\sqrt{5}} \cdot [(\frac{1+\sqrt{5}}{2})^{n+1} - (\frac{1-\sqrt{5}}{2})^{n+1}] $$ 12345public int climbStairs(int n){ double sqrt5 = Math.sqrt(5); double fibn = Math.pow((1+sqrt5)/2, n+1)-Math.pow((1-sqrt5)/2, n+1); return (int) (fibn/sqrt5);} time: $O(logn)$, space: $O(1)$

entry.title: 746. Min Cost Climbing Stairs-DP-1
entry.content: 问题描述 走楼梯，给一个数组，每个值是对应台阶所需要的花费，每次可以走一级或两级，问怎么走才能使花费最少？ 使用动态规划 递推式： $f[i]=cost[i]+min(f[i+1],f[i+2])$。 f[i]为从第i级台阶往后走的最大花费。 倒着推： 12345678910111213141516// Javapublic int minCostClimbingStairs(int[] cost){ int f1 = 0, f2 = 0; for(int i = cost.length-1; i >= 0; --i){ int f0 = cost[i] + Math.min(f1, f2); f2 = f1; f1 = f0; } return Math.min(f1, f2);}# Pythondef minCostClimbingStairs(self, cost): f1 = f2 = 0 for x in reversed(cost): f1, f2 = x + min(f1, f2), f1 return min(f1, f2) time: O(N), space: O(1) recursive top-down with memo 123456789int minCostClimbingStairs(vector<int>& cost){ return go(cost, cost.size());}unordered_map<int, int> memo;int go(vector<int>& c, int n){ if(memo.count(n)) return memo[n]; if(n <= 1) return memo[n] = c[n]; return memo[n] = (n==c.size() ? 0 : c[n]) + min(go(c, n-2), go(c, n-1));}

entry.title: 217. Contains Duplicate-15
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组，问有没有重复元素 方法一：暴力 两重循环找重复 方法二：排序 先排序，后遍历数组找重复。 12345678// Javapublic boolean containsDuplicate(int[] nums){ Arrays.sort(nums); for(int i = 0; i < nums.length - 1; i++){ if(nums[i] == nums[i+1]) return true; } return false;} 1234567// C++bool containsDuplicate(vector<int>& nums) { sort(nums.begin(), nums.end()); for(int i = 1; i < nums.size(); i++) if(nums[i] == nums[i-1]) return true; return false;} 方法三：HashTable 123456789// Javapublic boolean containsDuplicate(int[] nums){ Set<Integer> set = new HashSet<>(nums.length); for(int x: nums){ if(set.contains(x)) return true; set.add(x); } return false;} 123456789101112131415// C++bool containsDuplicate(vector<int>& nums){ return nums.size() > set<int>(nums.begin(), nums.end()).size;}// C++bool containsDuplicate(vector<int>& nums){ unordered_set<int> hash; int n = nums.size(); for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){ if(hash.find(nums[i]) != hash.end()) return true; hash.insert(nums[i]); } return false;} time: O(n), space: O(n)

entry.title: 122. Best Time to Buy and Sell StockII-14
entry.content: 问题描述 买卖股票，可以买卖多次 实现 水题，直接做 12345678int maxProfit(vector<int>& prices) { int total = 0; for(int i = 1; i < prices.size(); i++){ if(prices[i] > prices[i-1]) total += prices[i] - prices[i-1]; } return total; }

entry.title: 121. Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock-13
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组。数组里面是股票在每天的价格。在某一天买入，在某一天卖出，问最大的利润可以是多少？ 方法一：暴力（略） 方法二：One Pass 用一个变量记录价格最低点，用另一个变量记录最大的收益 1234567891011public int maxProfit(int prices[]){ int minprice = Integer.MAX_VALUE; int maxprofit = 0; for(int i = 0; i < prices.length; i++){ if(prices[i] < minprice) minprice = prices[i]; else if(prices[i] - minprice > maxprofit) maxprofit = price[i] - minprice; } return maxprofit;} 12345678910// C++int maxProfit(vector<int>& prices){ int maxPro = 0; int minPrice = INT_MAX; for(int i = 0; i < prices.size(); i++){ minPrice = min(minPrice, prices[i]); maxPro = max(maxPro, prices[i] - minPrice); } return maxPro;} time: O(n), space: O(1) 方法三：转换为 Maximum Subarray 后一天价格减去前一天价格，得到变化值，找到变化值和最大的子数组，使用动态规划。也叫 $Kadane's Algorithm$ 12345678int maxProfit(vector<int>& prices){ int maxCur = 0, maxSoFar = 0; for(int i = 1; i < prices.size(); i++){ maxCur = max(0, maxCur += prices[i] - prices[i-1]); maxSoFar = max(maxCur, maxSoFar); } return maxSoFar;}

entry.title: 169. Majority Element-12
entry.content: 问题描述 寻找众数（出现次数大于$\lfloor n/2 \rfloor$ ） 方法一：暴力 对每一个元素都数一下它自己出现的次数 1234567891011// javapublic int majorityElement(int[] nums){ int majorityCount = nums.length / 2; for(int num: nums){ int count = 0; for(int elem: nums) if(elem == num) count++; if(count > majorityCount) return num; } return -1;} 1234567# Pythondef majorityElement(self, nums): majority_count = len(nums)/2 for num in nums: count = sum(1 for elem in nums if elem == num) if count > majority_count: return num time: $O(n^2)$, space: $O(1)$ 方法二：HashMap 使用 HashMap 来数每个元素出现的个数 1234567891011121314151617// javaprivate Map<Integer, Integer> countNums(int[] nums){ Map<Integer, Integer> counts = new HashMap<Integer, Integer>(); for(int num: nums){ if(!counts.containsKey(num)) counts.put(num, 1); else counts.put(num, counts.get(num)+1); } return counts;}public int majorityElement(int[] nums){ Map<Integer, Integer> counts = countNums(nums); Map.Entry<Integer, Integer> majorityEntry = null; for(Map.Entry<Integer, Integer> entry: counts.entrySet()) if(majorityEntry == null || entry.getValue() > majorityEntry.getValue()) majorityEntry = entry; return majorityEntry.getKey();} 123456789101112# Python3def majorityElement(self, nums): counts = collections.Counter(nums) return max(counts.keys(), key=counts.get)// C++int majorityElement(vector<int>& nums){ unordered_map<int, int> counts; int n = nums.size(); for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) if(++counts[nums[i]] > n/2) return nums[i];} time: $O(n)$ space: $O(n)$ 方法三：排序 将数组进行排序，那么众数应该出现在 $\lfloor n/2 \rfloor$（n是奇数），或者 $\lfloor n/2 \rfloor+1$ （n为偶数） 123456789// javapublic int majorityElement(int[] nums){ Arrays.sort(nums); return nums[nums.length/2];}# Python3def majorityElement(self, nums): nums.sort() return nums[len(nums)//2] 12345678910// C++int majorityElement(vector<int>& nums){ nth_element(nums.begin(), nums.begin()+nums.size()/2, nums.end()); return nums[nums.size()/2];}// C++ sortint majorityElement(vector<int>& nums){ sort(nums); return nums[nums.size()/2];} 方法四：随机 随机选取一个数，判断它是不是众数 12345678910111213141516171819// Javaprivate int randRange(Random rand, int min, int max){ return rand.naxInt(max-min) + min;}private int countOccurences(int[] nums, int num){ int count = 0; for(int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) if(nums[i] == num) count++; return count;}public int majorityElement(int[] nums){ Random rand = new Random(); int majorityCount = nums.length/2; while(1){ int candidate = nums[randRange(rand, 0, nums.length)]; if(countOccurences(nums, candidate) > majorityCount) return candidate; }} 12345678# Pythonimport randomdef majorityElement(self, nums): majority_count = len(nums) // 2 while True: candidate = random.choice(nums) if sum(1 for elem in nums if elem == candidate) > majority_count: return candidate 12345678910111213// C++int majorityElement(vector<int>& nums){ int n = nums.size(); srand(unsigned(time(NULL))); while(1){ int idx = rand() % n; int candidate = nums[idx]; int counts = 0; for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) if(nums[i] == candidate) counts++; if(counts > n/2) return candidate; }} 方法五：分治法 12345678910111213141516171819private int countInRange(int[] nums, int num, int lo, int hi){ int count = 0; for(int i = lo; i <= hi; i++) // [lo, hi] all inclusive if(nums[i] == num) count++; return count;}private int majorityElementRec(int[] nums, int lo, int hi){ if(lo == hi) return nums[lo]; int mid = (hi-lo)/2 + lo; int left = majorityElementRec(nums, lo, mid); int right = majorityElementRec(nums, mid+1, hi); if(left == right) return left; int leftCount = countInRange(nums, left, lo, hi); int rightCount = countInRange(nums, right, lo, hi); return leftCount > rightCount ? left : right;}public int majorityElement(int[] nums){ return majorityElementRec(nums, 0, nums.length-1);} 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728# Python3def majorityElement(self, nums, lo=0, hi=None): def majority_element_rec(lo, hi): if lo == hi: return nums[lo] mid = (hi-lo)//2 + lo left = majority_element_rec(lo, mid) right = majority_element_rec(mid+1, hi) if left == right: return left left_count = sum(1 for i in range(lo, hi+1) if nums[i] == left) right_count = sum(1 for i in range(lo, hi+1) if nums[i] == right) return left if left_count > right_count else right return majority_element_rec(0, len(nums-1))// C++int majorityElement(vector<int>& nums){ return majority(nums, 0, nums.size()-1);}int majority(vector<int>& nums, int left, int right){ if(left == right) return nums[left]; int mid = left + ((right-left)>>1); int lm = majority(nums, left, mid); int rm = majority(nums, mid+1, right); if(lm == rm) return lm; int lcount = count(nums.begin()+left, nums.begin()+right+1, lm); int rcount = count(nums.begin()+left, nums.begin()+right+1, rm); return lcount > rcount ? lm : rm;} 方法六：Boyer-Moore Voting 从前向后遍历数组，首先把当前的元素认为是众数，用一个变量 count 来表示这个认为是众数的数出现的次数。往后依次处理元素，假如碰到了这个数，count加一，假如碰到的不是这个数，count减一，当 count 减为 0 时，重新选取下一个元素作为众数。相当于不断舍弃一个前缀，这个前缀中可能的众数和非众数的数量是相同的，所以可以保证的是即使舍弃的前缀中包含众数，这个众数在后缀中仍为众数。 12345678910// javapublic int majorityElement(int[] nums){ int count = 0; Integer candidate = null; for(int num: nums){ if(count == 0) candidate = num; count += (num == candidate)?1:-1; } return candidate;} 123456789# Pythondef majorityElement(self, nums) count = 0 candidate = None for num in nums: if count == 0: candidate = num count + (1 if num == candidate else -1) return candidate 123456789101112// C++int majorityElement(vector<int>& nums){ int major, counts = 0, n = nums.size(); for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){ if(!counts){ major = nums[i]; counts = 1; } else counts += (nums[i] == major) ? 1 : -1; } return major;} 方法七：Bit manipulation 找出这n个数，32bit中每个bit最多的的那一种情况 1234567891011121314int majorityElement(vector<int>& nums){ int major = 0, n = nums.size(); for(int i = 0, mask = 1; i < 32; i++, mask <<= 1){ int bitCounts = 0; for(int j = 0; j < n; j++){ if(nums[j] & mask) bitCounts++; if(bitCounts > n/2){ major |= mask; break; } } } return major;}

entry.title: 448. Find All Numbers Disappeared in an Array-11
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组，找到数组中按顺序缺少的元素。（数组长度为n，数组中元素的取值范围为[1,n]（说明有重复元素）） 实现 遍历数组用数组中的元素值作为下标，将该下标对应的数组元素的绝对值取负。这样到最后所有访问过的下标中，其对应的数组元素值为负，那些元素值为正的说明其下标未被访问过，因此该下标对应的元素不存在。 123456# Pythondef findDisappearedNumbers(self, nums): for i in xrange(len(nums)): index = abs(nums[i]) - 1; nums[index] = -abs(nums[index]) return [i+1 for i in range(len(nums)) if nums[i] > 0] 1234567891011// C++vector<int> findDisappearedNumbers(vector<int>& nums) { for(int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++){ int index = abs(nums[i]) - 1; if(nums[index] > 0) nums[index] *= -1; } vector<int> ans; for(int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++) if(nums[i] > 0) ans.push_back(i+1); return ans;}

entry.title: 283. Move Zeros-10
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组，把里面的0移动到最后，并且不能改变其他元素的相对位置。 方法一 数出0的个数，然后把非0元素放到向量中，最后再把0放入向量中。time: O(n), space: O(n) 12345678910void moveZers(vector<int>& nums){ int n = nums.size(); int numZeros = 0; for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) numZeros += (nums[i] == 0); vector<int> ans; for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) if(nums[i] != 0) ans.push_back(nums[i]); while(numZeros--) ans.push_back(0); for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) nums[i] = ans[i];} 方法二：使用两个指针 一个指针用来遍历整个数组，另外一个指针将非0元素重写到数组前面。 time: O(n), space: O(1) 12345678void moveZeros(vector<int>& nums){ int lastNonZeroFoundAt = 0; for(int i = 0; i < num.size(); i++) if(nums[i] != 0) nums[lastNonZeroFoundAt++] = nums[i]; for(int i = lastNonZeroFoundAt; i < nums.size(); i++) nums[i] = 0;} 方法三：最优解，使操作同时也最少 碰到一个非0时只需与前面的进行交换。 12345void moveZeros(vector<int>& nums){ for(int lastNonZeroFoundAt = 0, cur = 0; cur < nums.size(); cur++) if(nums[cur] != 0) swap(nums[lastNonZeroFoundAt++], nums[cur]);}

entry.title: 888. Fair Candy Swap-9
entry.content: 问题描述 交换两个人的糖果，使两个人的糖果总大小一样 实现 123456789101112public int[] fairCandySwap(int[] A, int[] B){ int sa = 0, sb = 0; // sum of A, B respectively for(int x: A) sa += x; for(int x: B) sb += x; int delta = (sb-sa)/2; // Alice gives x, she expects to receive x + delta Set<Integer> setB = new HashSet(); for(int x: B) setB.add(x); for(int x: A) if(setB.contain(x+delta)) return new int[]{x, x+delta};} 12345678// C++vector<int> fairCandySwap(vector<int> A, vector<int> B){ int dif = (accumulate(A.begin(), A.end(), 0) - accumulate(B.begin(), B.end(), 0)) / 2; unordered_set<int> S(A.begin(), A.end()); for(int b:B) if(S.count(b+dif)) return {b+dif, b};} time: $O(A.length+B.length)$ space: $O(B.length)$

entry.title: 485. Max Consecutive Ones-8
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个只含有0和1的数组，问里面最多的连续1的长度 实现 123456public int findMaxConsecutiveOnes(int[] nums){ int maxHere = 0, max = 0; for(int n: nums) max = Maxth.max(max, maxHere = (n==0)?0:maxHere+1); return max;} 1234567// C++int findMaxConsecutiveOnes(vector<int>& nums) { int maxHere = 0, m = 0; for(auto & n: nums) m = max(m, maxHere=(n==0)?0:maxHere+1); return m; }

entry.title: 896. Monotonic Array-7
entry.content: 问题描述 判断一个数组是否单调 实现 123456789101112bool isMonotonic(vector<int>& A) { int size = A.size(); if(size <= 1) return true; bool incr = true; bool decr = true; for(int i = 1; i < size; i++){ if(A[i-1] > A[i]) incr = false; if(A[i-1] < A[i]) decr = false; // if(!incr && !decr) break; } return incr || decr;}

entry.title: 566 Reshape the Matrix-6
entry.content: 问题描述 实现矩阵的 reshape 操作 方法一：使用队列 $time: O(mn) space: O(mn)$ 1234567891011121314public int[][] matrixReshape(int[][] nums, int r, int c){ int[][] res = new int[r][c]; if(nums.length == 0 || r*c != nums.length * nums[0].length) return nums; int count = 0; Queue<Integer> queue = new LinkedList<>(); for(int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) for(int j = 0; j < nums[0].length; j++) queue.add(nums[i][j]); for(int i = 0; i < r; i++) for(int j = 0; j < c; j++) res[i][j] = queue.remove(); return res;} 1234567891011121314151617// C++vector<vector<int>> matrixReshape(vector<vector<int>>& nums, int r, int c) { vector<vector<int>> res(r, vector<int>(c, 0)); int preR = nums.size(), preC = nums[0].size(); if(preR==0 || r*c != preR*preC) return nums; int count = 0; queue<int> q; for(int i = 0; i < preR; i++) for(int j = 0; j < preC; j++) q.push(nums[i][j]); for(int i = 0; i < r; i++) for(int j = 0; j < c; j++){ res[i][j] = q.front(); q.pop(); } return res;} 方法二：不使用队列 123456789for(int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) for(int j = 0; j < nums[0].length; j++){ res[rows][cols] = nums[i][j]; cols++; if(cols == c){ rows++; cols = 0; } } 方法三：使用除法和余数 123// inside the for loop:res[count/c][count%c] = nums[i][j];count++

entry.title: 766. Toeplitz Matrix-5
entry.content: 问题描述 判断一个矩阵是否是 Toeplitz 矩阵。 矩阵的特性是：每一个从左上到右下的对角线上元素相等。 方法一：根据对角线性质 time: O(M*N) space: O(M+N) 123456789101112// r1 - c1 == r2 - c2 -> 这样的元素在同一组中public boolean isToeplitzMatrix(int[][] matrix){ Map<Integer, Integer> groups = new HashMap(); for(int r = 0; r < matrix.length; r++){ for(int c = 0; c < matrix[0].length; c++) if(!groups.containsKey(r-c)) groups.put(r-c, matrix[r][c]); else if (groups.get(r-c) != matrix[r][c]) return false; } return true;} 方法二：每一个元素与它左上角元素作比较 time: O(M*N) space: O(1) 123456789101112131415public boolean isToeplitzMatrix(int[][] matrix){ for(int r = 0; r < matrix.length; r++) for(int c = 0; c < matrix[0].length; c++) if(r > 0 && c > 0 && matrix[r-1][c-1] != matrix[r][c]) return false; return true;}// C++bool isToeplitzMatrix(vector<vector<int>>& matrix) { int R = matrix.size(); // 只计算一次，相比上一个用时会更短 int C = matrix[0].size(); for(int r = 0; r < R; r++) for(int c = 0; c < C; c++) if(r > 0 && c > 0 && matrix[r-1][c-1] != matrix[r][c]) return false; return true;}

entry.title: 867. Transpose Matrix-4
entry.content: 问题描述 实现矩阵的转置 实现 直接复制 12345678public int[][] transpose(int[][] A){ int R = A.length, C = A[0].length; int[][] ans = new int[C][R]; for(int r = 0; r < R; r++) for(int c = 0; c < R; c++) ans[c][r] = A[r][c]; return ans;} 123456789// C++vector<vector<int>> transpose(vector<vector<int>>& A) { int R = A.size(), C = A[0].size(); vector<vector<int>> ans(C, vector<int>(R, 0)); for(int r = 0; r < R; r++) for(int c = 0; c < C; c++) ans[c][r] = A[r][c]; return ans;}

entry.title: 561. Array Partition I-3
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组，使数组中的元素两两结合后取小者相加，问和最大是多少 实现 对数组进行排序，然后从第0个元素开始每个2个元素取。时间复杂度取决于排序的时间复杂度 1234567int arrayPairSum(vector<int>& nums){ int sum = 0; std::sort(nums.begin(), nums.end()); for(int i = 0; i < nums.size()-1; i+=2) sum += nums[i]; return sum;} 123456789101112131415// 一种类似于桶排序的思路int arrayPairSum(vector<int>& nums){ int hash[20001] = {0}; for(int n: nums) ++hash[n+10000]; bool flag = true; int sum = 0; for(int i = 0; i < 20001; i++){ if(hash[i] == 0) continue; if(flag == true) sum+= ((hash[i] + 1)/2) * (i-10000); else sum += (hash[i]/2) * (i-10000); if(hash[i]&0x01) flag = !flag; } return sum;}

entry.title: 832. Flipping an Image-2
entry.content: 问题描述 翻转图片中的像素，并取反 实现 12345678910public int[][] flipAndIvertImage(int[][] A){ int C = A[0].length; for(int[] row : A) for(int i = 0; i < (C+1)/2; i++){ int tmp = row[i]^1; row[i] = row[C-1-i]^1; row[C-1-i] = tmp; } return A;} 123456789101112// C++vector<vector<int>> flipAndInvertImage(vector<vector<int>>& A){ size_t rows = A.size(); size_t cols = A[0].size(); for(int i = 0; i < rows; i++) for(int j = 0; j < cols/2; j++) swap(A[i][j], A[i][cols-j-1]); for(int i = 0; i < rows; i++) for(int j = 0; j < cols; j++) A[i][j] = !A[i][j]; return A;}

entry.title: 905. Sort Array By Parity-1
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组，把偶数放在数组前面，奇数放在数组后面 方法一：排序 直接进行排序，time: O(NlongN),space: O(N) 123def sortArrayByParity(self, A): A.sort(key = lambda x: x%2) return A 方法二： 走两轮 time O(N), space: O(N) 1234567891011public int[] sortArrayByParity(int[] A){ int[] ans = new int[A.length]; int t = 0; for(int i = 0; i < A.length; i++) if(A[i]%2==0) // even ans[t++] = A[i]; for(int i = 0; i < A.length; i++) if(A[i]%2==1) // odd ans[t++] = A[i]; return ans} 123# Pythondef sortArrayByParity(self, A): return ([x for x in A if x%2==0] + [x for x in A if x%2==1]) 方法三：就地算法 维护两个指针i,j，循环时保证所有下标小于i的都是偶数，所有下标大于j的都是奇数。 time: O(N), space: O(1) 12345678910111213public int[] sortArrayByParity(int[] A){ int i = 0, j = A.length - 1; while(i < j){ if(A[i] % 2 > A[j] % 2){ int tmp = A[i]; A[i] = A[j]; A[j] = tmp; } if(A[i]%2==0) i++; if(A[j]%2==1) j--; } return A;}

entry.title: 15. 3Sum
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个数组，问其中哪三个元素相加等于0 实现 对于数组中的每一个元素，用两个指针指向后面数组的初始与结束，两个指针不断向中间靠拢，最后得到结果。 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728vector<vector<int>> threeSum(vector<int>& nums) { sort(nums.begin(), nums.end()); vector<vector<int>> ans; int size = nums.size(); int num1, num2, num3; int j, k; for(int i = 0; i < size; i++){ int target = -nums[i]; j = i + 1; k = size - 1; while(j < k){ int sum = nums[j] + nums[k]; if(sum < target) j++; else if(sum > target) k--; else{ num1 = nums[i]; num2 = nums[j]; num3 = nums[k]; vector<int> a = {num1, num2, num3}; ans.push_back(a); while(j < k && nums[j] == num2) j++; while(j < k && nums[k] == num3) k--; } while(i+1 < size && nums[i+1] == nums[i]) i++; } } return ans;}

entry.title: 14. Longest Common Prefix
entry.content: 问题描述 寻找多个字符串中最长的公共前缀。若无则返回空串。 解法一：水平扫描 根据观察有： $$ LCP(S_1...S_n) = LCP(...LCP(LCP(S_1,S_2),S_3)...S_N) $$ 时间复杂度为 $O(S)$，其中 S 为所有字符串中所有字符的总数。空间复杂度为 $O(1)$ 12345678910public String longestCommonPrefix(String[] strs){ if(strs.length == 0) return ""; String prefix = strs[0]; for(int i = 1; i < strs.length; i++) while(strs[i].indexOf(prefix) != 0){ prefix = prefix.substring(0, prefix.length()-1); // end index is exclusive while start index is inclusive if(prefix.isEmpty()) return ""; } return prefix; } 解法二：垂直扫描 在水平扫描中加入最后一个字符串非常短，那么这样的话会造成不必要的比较，所以考虑一行一行地进行扫描。 时间复杂度为 $O(S)$，空间复杂度为 $O(1)$。 12345678910111213141516171819public String longestCommonPreFix(String[] strs){ if(strs == null || strs.length == 0) return ""; for(int i = 0; i < strs[0].length(); i++){ char c = strs[0].charAt(i); for(int j = 1; j < strs.length; j++) if(i == strs[j].length() || strs[j].charAt(i) != c) return strs[0].substring(0, i); } return strs[0];}// C++ versionif(strs.size() == 0) return "";for(int i = 0; i < strs[0].length(); i++){ char c = strs[0][i]; for(int j = 1; j < strs.size(); j++) if(i == strs[j].length() || strs[j][i] != c) return strs[0].substr(0, i);}return strs[0]; 解法三：分而治之 注意到 $$ LCP(S_1...S_n) = LCP(LCP(S_1...S_k), LCP(S_{k+1}...S_{n})) $$ 1234567891011121314151617181920public String longestCommonPrefix(String[] strs){ if(strs == null || strs.length == 0) return ""; return longestCommonPrefix(strs, 0, strs.length-1);}private String longestCommonPrefix(String[] strs, int l, int r){ if(l == r) return strs[l]; else{ int mid = (l+r) / 2; String lcpLeft = longestCommonPrefix(strs, l, mid); String lcpRight = longestCommonPrefix(strs, mid+1, r); return commonPrefix(lcpLeft, lcpRight); }}String commonPrefix(String left, String right){ int min = Math.min(left.length(), right.length()); for(int i = 0; i < min; i++) if(left.charAt(i) != right.charAt(i)) return left.substring(0, i); return left.substring(0, min);} 时间复杂度为 $O(S)$，S = m*n，在最坏情况下有n个相同的长度为m的字符串。 $$ T(n) = 2 \cdot T(\frac{n}{2}) + O(m) $$ 最好情况下需要 $O(minLen\cdot n)$次比较，其中 $minLne$ 为最短的字符串的长度。 空间复杂度：$O(m\cdot log(n))$，因为总共有 $log(n)$ 次递归调用，每次需要 $m$ 的空间用来进行存储。 解法四：二分查找 在 $(0, minLen)$ 区间内进行最长公共前缀的查找，其中 $minLen$ 是所有字符串中最短的长度。使用二分查找，当前半部分不是公共前缀时，再在前半部分继续查找，舍弃后半部分，当前半部分是公共前缀时，舍弃前半部分，在后半部分继续进行查找。 12345678910111213141516171819202122public String longestCommonPrefix(String[] strs){ if(strs == null || strs.length == 0) return ""; int minLen = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for(String str : strs) minLen = Math.min(minLen, str.length()); int low = 1; int high = minLen; while(low <= high){ int middle = (low + high) / 2; if(isCommonPrefix(strs, middle)) low = middle + 1; else high = middle - 1; } return strs[0].substring(0, (low+high)/2);}private boolean isCommonPrefix(String[] strs, int len){ String str1 = str[0].substring(0, len); for(int i = 1; i < strs.length; i++) if(!strs[i].startsWith(str1)) return false; return true;} 时间复杂度：$O(S\cdot log(n))$，因为有 $log(n)$ 次迭代。 空间复杂度：$O(1)$ 拓展：Trie

entry.title: 12. Integer to Roman
entry.content: 问题描述 将整数转换成罗马数字，对应关系如下： 12345678Symbol ValueI 1V 5X 10L 50C 100D 500M 1000 正常情况表示加法，如 "XI" "CIII" 有六种特殊情况表示减法： 123IX => 4 IX => 9XL => 40 XC => 90CD => 400 CM => 900 输入范围为 1~3999 实现 12345678string intToRoman(int num){ string romanPieces[]={"","I","II","III","IV","V","VI","VII","VIII","IX", "","X","XX","XXX","XL","L","LX","LXX","LXXX","XC", "","C","CC","CCC","CD","D","DC","DCC","DCCC","CM", "","M","MM","MMM","MMMM"}; return romanPieces[num/1000+30]+romanPieces[(num/100)%10+20] +romanPieces[(num/10)%10+10]+romanPieces[num%10];}

entry.title: 11. Container With Most Water
entry.content: 问题描述 给一组数字，每一个数字对应着一个坐标(i, a[i])，将这些坐标画成柱状统计图，问哪两个柱子之间可以存放最多的水 解法一：暴力 枚举所有的可能，找到最大值。时间复杂度 $O(n^2)$，空间复杂度 $O(1)$ 1234567public int maxArea(int[] height){ int maxarea = 0; for(int i = 0; i < height.length; i++) for(int j = i = 1; j < height.length; j++) maxarea = Math.max(maxarea, Math.min(height[i], height[j]) * (j-i)); return maxarea;} 解法二：两个指针法（two pointers） 两个指针分别指向最左和最右，由于整个面积是由较低的那一边决定的，所以考虑每次两个指针向内移动时的顺序：如果将现在指向的较高边的那个指针内移，则总面积是一定减小的，因为现在面积是由较低的那一边决定的，向内移又导致了宽度的减小，故如果移动较高一侧的指针的话，总面积一定减小。故每次向内移动较低一侧的指针。时间复杂度：$O(n)$，空间复杂度：$O(1)$ 123456789public int maxArea(int[] height){ int maxarea = 0, l = 0, r = height.length - 1; while(l < r){ maxarea = Math.max(maxarea, Math.min(height[l], height[r]) * (r-l)); if(height[l] < height[r]) l++; else r--; } return maxarea;}

entry.title: 10. Regular Expression Matching
entry.content: 问题描述 实现正则表达式匹配。 '.' 可以匹配所有的单字符 '*' 可以匹配0个或多个之前的元素 方法一：递归 没有 '*' 的时候，实现如下： 1234def match(text, pattern): if not pattern: return not text first_match = bool(text) and pattern[0] in {text[0], '.'} return first_match and match(text[1:], pattern[1:]) 有 $''$ 的时候，它会出现在 $pattern[1]$，然后我们或者忽略掉这部分（因为$''$匹配0个或多个前面的元素），或者删除掉匹配的这部分。 12345678def isMatch(self, text, pattern): if not pattern: return not text; first_match = bool(text) and pattern[0] in {text[0], '.'} if len(pattern) >= 2 and pattern[1] == '*': return (self.isMatch(text, pattern[2:]) or first_match and self.isMatch(text[1:], pattern)) else: return first_match and self.isMatch(text[1:], pattern[1:]) 方法二：动态规划 记录 $dp(i,j):isMatch(text[i:],pattern[j:])$ 自顶向下的解法： 123456789101112131415def isMatch(self, text, pattern): memo = {} def dp(i, j): if (i, j) not in memo: # true if j == len(pattern): # j = 0 => else ans = i = len(text) else: first_match = i < len(text) and pattern[j] in {text[i], '.'} if j+1 < len(pattern) and pattern[j+1] == '*': ans = dp(i, j+2) or first_match and dp(i+1,j) else: ans = first_match and dp(i+1, j+1) memo[i, j] = ans return memo[i, j] return dp(0, 0) 自底向上的解法： 1234567891011def isMatch(self, text, pattern): dp = [[Flase] * (len(pattern) + 1) for _ in range(len(text) + 1)] dp[-1][-1] = True for i in range(len(text), -1, -1): for j in range(len(pattern)-1, -1, -1): first_match = i < len(text) and pattern[j] in {text[i], '.'} if j+1 < len(pattern) and pattern[j+1] == '*': dp[i][j] = dp[i][j+2] or first_match and dp[i+1][j] else: dp[i][j] = first_match and dp[i+1][j+1] return dp[0][0]

entry.title: 9. Palindrome Number
entry.content: 问题描述 确定一个整数是否是一个回文数（带符号） 思路 翻转一半的数字，比如数字 1221，翻转后一半为 12， 再和前一半 12，相比，相等说明是回文。 实现 123456789101112131415161718192021// 翻转全部bool isPalindrome(int x) { if(x < 0) return false; int x1 = x; int val = 0; while(x1){ val = val*10 + x1%10; x1 /= 10; } return val == x;}// 翻转一半bool isPalindrome(int x){ if(x < 0 || (x%10 == 0 && x != 0)) return false; int revertedNumber = 0; while(x > revertedNumber){ revertedNumber = revertedNumber * 10 + x % 10; x /= 10; } return x == revertedNumber || x == revertedNumber/10;}

entry.title: 8. String to Integer
entry.content: 问题描述 字符串转换为整数 实现 1234567891011121314int atoi(const char* str){ int sign = 1, base = 0, i = 0; while(str[i] == ' ') i++; if(str[i] == '-' || str[i] == '+') sign = 1 - 2 * (str[i++] == '-'); while(str[i] >= '0' && str[i] <= '9'){ if(base > INT_MAX/10 || (base == INT_MAX/10 && str[i] - '0' > 7)){ // because INT_MAX = 2147483647 if(sign == 1) return INT_MAX; else return INT_MIN; } base = 10*base + (str[i++] - '0'); } return base * sign;}

entry.title: 7. Reverse Integer
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个32bit有符号整数，翻转各位输出，如： 1234输入 123输出 321输入 -123输出 -321 实现 12345678int reverse(int x) { long long res = 0; while(x){ res = res*10 + x%10; x /= 10; } return (res < INT_MIN || res > INT_MAX) ? 0 : res;}

entry.title: 6. ZigZag Conversion
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个字符串，再给一个行数，把这个字符串按照一个ZigZag的方式进行排列。比如字符串为 $"ABCDEFGHIJ"$，行数为3，排列如下： 123A E IB D F H JC G 然后每一行依次读为 $"AEIBDFHJCG"$，目标就是求出对应的字符串 方法一：按行来排 遍历这个字符串，用一个标记来记录当前运动的方向，运动的方向决定了下一个字符要存放在哪一行中。 时间空间复杂度均为 $O(n)$ 1234567891011121314string convert(string s, int numRows){ if(numRows == 1) return s; vector<string> rows(min(numRows, int(s.size()))); int curRow = 0; bool goingdown = false; for(char c: s){ rows[curRow] += c; if(curRow == 0 || curRow == numRows-1) goingdown = !goingdown; curRow += (goingdown? 1: -1); } string ret; for(string row: rows) ret += row; return ret;} 方法二：根据行来访问 可知，对于一个数 $k$，有 第0行的字符在下标 $k(2 \cdot numRows-2)$ 第numRows-1行的字符在 $k(2 \cdot numRows-2)+numRows-1$ 中间第i行的字符在 $k(2 \cdot numRows-2)+i$ 和 $(k+1)(2 \cdot numRows-2)-i$ 1234567891011121314string convert(string s, int numRows){ if(numRows == 1) return s; string ret; int n = s.size(); int cycleLen = 2 * numRows - 2; for(int i = 0; i < numRows; i++){ for(int j = 0; j+i < n; j += cycleLen){ ret += s[j+i]; if(i != 0 && numRows-1 && j+cycleLen-i < n) ret += s[j+cycleLen-i]; } } return ret;}

entry.title: 5. Longest Palindromic Substring
entry.content: 问题描述 在一个字符串中找到最长的回文子串 思路 解法一：运用最长公共子串（Longest Common Substring） 但是直接用会有问题，比如考虑如下解法： $原字符串为\ S，将字符串进行翻转，翻转之后的字符串为\ S'$，认为 $S\ 和\ S'$ 的最长公共子串为原字符串的最长公共回文串。 以上解法有小问题，比如，当 $S="abacdecaba"$ 时，$S'="abacedcaba"$，此时他们的最长公共子串为 $"abac"$，明显答案是错误的。即当原字符串中有一个逆序的非回文子串时，这种方法就会出现错误。 解决的办法是对于每一个找到的子串候选者，判断子串的下标是否和逆子串的原始下标一样，如果一样，则认为是子回文串，否则跳过。比如 $"abac"的下标是"0123"$，逆子串为 $"caba"$，其原始下标为 $"6789"$，两者不一样，所以跳过。而对于$S="caba"$，子串$"aba"的下标是"123"$，逆子串为 $"aba"$，其原始下标为 $"123"$，是一样的，所以认为是符合回文子串的要求的。 故问题转化为寻找两个子串的最长公共子串，可以使用动态规划法，时间复杂度为 $O(n^2)$，空间复杂度为 $O(n^2)$（可优化为$O(n)$）。 解法二：暴力 枚举所有可能， 时间复杂度 $O(n^3)$ 解法三：直接使用动态规划 如果已经知道一个子串为回文串，那么只要判断两边的字符是否相等就可以知道扩展的子串是否是回文串。 定义： $$ P(i,j) = \begin{cases} true & S_i...S_j \ 是回文串 \ false & S_i...S_j \ 不是回文串 \end{cases} $$ 则有 $$ P(i, j) = (P(i-1, j-1)\ and\ S_i == S_j) $$ 初始条件为 $$ P(i,i) = true $$ $$ P(i,i+1) = (S_i==S_{i+1}) $$ 所以可以对每一个位置初始化长度为1或者2的回文串，然后找到最长的回文串。 解法四：在中心扩展 对于一个长度为 $n$ 的字符串来说，可以作为回文串的中心有 $2n-1$ 个位置（考虑中心在两个字符之间的情况）。 所以可以遍历这些位置，然后依次地在中心进行扩展。 123456789101112131415161718192021public String longestPalindrome(String s){ if(s == null || s.length() < 1) return ""; // s in not null or s is not empty int start = 0, end = 0; for(int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++){ int len1 = expandAroundCenter(s, i, i); // center is i int len2 = expandAroundCenter(s, i, i+1); // center is the space between i and i+1 int len = Math.max(len1, len2); if(len > end - start){ start = i - (len-1)/2; end = i + len/2; } } return s.substring(start, end+1);}private int expandAroundCenter(String s, int left, int right){ int L = left, R = right; while(L >= 0 && R < s.length() && s.charAt(L) == s.charAt(R)){ // if two characters are the same, expand. L--; R++; } return R-L-1;} 12345678910111213141516171819# Python versiondef longestPalindrome(self, s): res = "" for i in xrange(len(s)): # odd case, like "aba" tmp = self.helper(s, i, i) if len(tmp) > len(res): res = tmp # even case, like "abba" tmp = self.helper(s, i, i+1) if len(tmp) > len(res): res = tmp return res# get the longest palindrome, l, r are the middle indices# from inner to outerdef helper(self, s, l, r): while l >= 0 and r < len(s) and s[l] == s[r]: l -= 1; r += 1 return s[l+1:r] 时间复杂度为 $O(n^2)$，空间复杂度为 $O(1)$ 方法五：Manacher's Algorithm 可以达到 $O(n)$ 时间复杂度。 思路如下： 首先将字符串的空隙填满一个辅助字符 $'#'$，比如对于字符串 $S="abaaba"$，填充之后为 $T="#a#b#a#a#b#a#"$。用 $P[i]$ 表示以 $T_i$ 为中心的最长回文子串的长度。如： 12T: # a # b # a # a # b # a #P: 0 1 0 3 0 1 6 1 0 3 0 1 0 假设 $"C"$ 为一个已知回文子串的中心下标，该回文子串最右侧下标为 $"R"$，最左侧下标为 $"L"$，则当求下标 $i$ 处的 $P[i]$ 值时，有一下结论成立（$i'$ 为 $i$ 关于 $C$ 对称的下标）： 1234if P[i'] <= R - i P[i] = P[i']else P[i] >= P[i'] (需要通过扩展右边界R来寻找P[i]的值) 代码如下： 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839// "abba" => "^#a#b#b#a#$"string preProcess(string s){ int n = s.length(); if(n == 0) return "^$"; string ret = "^"; for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) ret += "#" + s.substr(i, 1); ret += "#$"; return ret;}string longestPalindrome(string s){ string T = preProcess(s); int n = T.length(); int *P = new int[n]; // P denotes the maximum length of a palindrome substring int C = 0, R = 0; for(int i = 1; i < n-1; i++){ int i_mirror = 2*C-1; // i' = C - (i-C) P[i] = (R>i) ? min(R-i, P[i_mirror]):0; // Attempt to expand palindrome centered at i while(T[i+1+P[i]] == T[i-1-P[i]]) P[i]++; // if palindrome centered at i expand past R, // adjust center based on expanded palindrome. if(i + P[i] > R){ C = i; R = i + P[i]; } } // Find the maximum element in P int maxLen = 0; int centerIndex = 0; for(int i = 1; i < n-1; i++){ if(P[i] > maxLen){ maxLen = P[i]; centerIndex = i; } } delete[] P; return s.substr((centerIndex - maxLen)/2, maxLen);}

entry.title: 4. Median of Two Sorted Arrays
entry.content: 问题描述 找到两个有序数组的中位数。 要求时间复杂度为 $O(log(m+n))$ 思路 将两个数组各自分成两部分，假设其为 $aLeft$，$aRight$，$bLeft$，$bRight$，只要保证两个数组左半部分的长度之和等于右半部分的长度之和并且，左半部分中的任何一个元素都不大于右半部分，那么左半部分的最大值加上右半部分的最小值再除以二就是中位数。 假设 $a$ 被分为 $a[0\sim i-1]\ \ \ a[i\sim m-1]$ 假设 $b$ 被分为 $b[0\sim j-1]\ \ \ b[j\sim n-1]$ $则\ i,j\ 满足关系$ $$ i+j=m-i+n-j \tag{1} $$ $$ a[i-1] \le b[j] \tag{2} $$ $$ b[j-1] \le a[i] \tag{3} $$ 其中根据 $(1)$ 可得： $$ j = \frac{m+n-2i}{2} \tag{4} $$ 故为使 $j$ 保持为正数，在开头确保 $m\le n$。 则现在问题归结为在 $[0,m-1]中找一数\ i$，使得 $(2)(3)$ 成立。可以考虑使用二分法，最后达到的时间复杂度为 $O(log(m+n))$ 实现 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334double findMedianSortedArrays(vector<int>& nums1, vector<int>& nums2) { int m = nums1.size(); int n = nums2.size(); if(m > n){ // 通过交换保证 nums1 的大小小于 nums2 vector<int> temp(nums1); nums1 = nums2; nums2 = temp; int tmp = m; m = n; n = tmp; } int iMin = 0, iMax = m, halfLen = (m + n + 1)/2; while(iMin <= iMax){ int i = (iMin + iMax) / 2; int j = halfLen - i; if(i < iMax && nums2[j-1] > nums1[i]){ iMin = i + 1; } else if(i > iMin && nums1[i-1] > nums2[j]){ iMax = iMax - 1; } else{ int maxLeft = 0; if(i == 0) maxLeft = nums2[j-1]; else if(j == 0) maxLeft = nums1[i-1]; else {maxLeft = std::max(nums1[i-1], nums2[j-1]);} if((m+n) % 2 == 1) return maxLeft; int minRight = 0; if(i == m) minRight = nums2[j]; else if(j == n) minRight = nums1[i]; else {minRight = std::min(nums2[j], nums1[i]);} return (maxLeft + minRight) / 2.0; } } return 0.0;}

entry.title: 3. Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
entry.content: 问题描述 给一个字符串，找到一个没有重复字符的最长子串长度。 思路 方法一：暴力 考察所有的子串，分析是否是无重复字符的最长子串。 123456789101112131415161718// 时间复杂度：O(n^3)int lengthOfLongestSubstring(String s){ int n = s.length(); int ans = 0; for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) for(int j = i+1; j <= n; j++) if(allUnique(s,i,j)) ans = Math.max(ans, j-i); return ans;} boolean allUnique(String s, int start, int end){ Set<Character> set = new HashSet<>(); for(int i = start; i < end; i++){ Character ch = s.charAt(i); if(set.contsins(ch)) return false; set.add(ch); } return true;} 方法二：滑动窗口法 只需要查看新加入的元素是否在现有的子串中，如果不在，那么把这个新元素加入子串，如果在，则将子串最左的下标向后移动直到没有重复元素。 查看是否存在可以使用散列，此查找操作复杂度为 $O(1)$ 12345678910111213int lengthOfLongestSubstring(String s){ int n = s.length(); // total length Set<Character> set = new HashSet<>(); // use hashset int ans = 0, i = 0, j = 0; while(i < n && j < n){ // try to extend the range[i,j] if(!set.contains(s.charAt(j))){ // if it doesn't contain the character to be added set.add(s.charAt(j++)); and = Math.max(ans, j-i); } else set.remove(s.charAt(i++)); } return ans;} 时间复杂度为 $O(n)$，最坏情况下每一个字符会被访问两次 空间复杂度为 $O(min(m,n))$，m是字符集的大小，n是字符总数 方法三：优化的滑动窗口法 当发现新的元素产生一个重复时，不用一点点地增加开头的下标，而是直接加到前面重复的那个元素后面去。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223int lengthOfLongestSubstring(String s){ int n = s.length(), ans = 0; Map<Character, Integer> map = new HashMap<>(); // current index of character // try to extend the range[i,j] for(int j = 0, i = 0; j < n; j++){ if(map.containsKey(s.charAt(j))) i = Math.max(map.get(s.charAt(j)), i); // index+1 if exists ans = Math.max(ans, j-i+1); map.put(s.charAt(j), j+1); // value is index+1 }}// can replace map with an array if charset is rather smallint lengthOfLongestSubstring(String s){ int n = s.length(), ans = 0; int[] index = new int[128]; // current index of character // try to extend the range for(int j = 0, i = 0; j < n; j++){ i = Math.max(index[s.charAt(j)], i); ans = Math.max(ans, j-i+1); index[s.charAt(j)] = j+1; } return ans;} 时间复杂度：$O(n)$ 空间复杂度： hashmap: $O(min(m,n))$ table: $O(m)$ m 是字符集的大小。 12345678910int lengthOfLongestSubstring(string s){ vector<int> dict(256, -1); // 使用一个向量来存储每个字符出现的下标 int maxLen = 0, start = -1; for(int i = 0; i != s.length(); i++){ if(dict[s[i]] > start) start = dict[s[i]]; dict[s[i]] = i; maxLen = max(maxLen, i - start); } return maxLen;} 12345678910111213int lengthOfLongestSubstring(string s){ int ans = 0; std::map<char, int> hashmap; for(int j = 0; j < s.length(); j++){ // 使用 hashmap，思路跟之前的相似 if(hashmap.count(s[j])){ // ->second denotes value in [key, value] i = std::max(hashmap.find(s[j])->second, i); hashmap.find(s[j])->second = j + 1; } else hashmap.insert(pair<char, int>(s[j], j+1)); ans = std::max(ans, j-i+1); } return ans;} 1234567891011121314int p[256] = {0};int ans = 0;int start = 0;for(int i = 0; i < s.size(); i++){ // 方法与之前大致类似 if(p[s[i]] > 0) { if(p[s[i]] > 0){ ans = max(ans, i-start); for(start; start < p[s[i]] - 1; start++) p[s[start]] = 0; // start 表示新的重复元素的位置 start = p[s[i]]; } p[s[i]] = i+1; // 此处的值为下标+1，最后的结果长度是 i-start (没有加一) }}

entry.title: 2. Add Two Numbers
entry.content: 问题描述 给两个链表，每个链表逆序存放了两个正整数，每个节点是一个数字。将这两个正整数相加，仍以链表的形式返回和。 思路 对链表进行操作，一位一位加，注意进位以及两个整数长度不同时的处理。 实现 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526ListNode* addTwoNumbers(ListNode* l1, ListNode* l2) { int carry = 0; // carry value int sum = 0; // current sum int remainder = 0; // current remainder ListNode *result = NULL; // result ListNode *p = result; ListNode *p1 = l1; ListNode *p2 = l2; while(p1 != NULL || p2 != NULL || carry){ sum = (p1?p1->val:0) + (p2?p2->val:0) + carry; carry = sum / 10; remainder = sum % 10; ListNode *newNode = new ListNode(remainder); // store the value if(result == NULL){ // the first position result = newNode; p = result; } else{ // other positions p->next = newNode; p = newNode; } p1 = p1?p1->next:p1; p2 = p2?p2->next:p2; } return result;}

entry.title: 编程之美 4.1 金刚坐飞机问题
编程之美 3.11 程序改错
entry.content: 问题描述 找出一个有序字符串数组中等于字符串v的元素的序号，如果有多个元素满足，则返回序号最大的。 实现 12345678910111213// 纠正之后的int bisearch(char** arr, int b, int e, char* v){ int minIndex = b, maxIndex = e, midIndex; while(minIndex < maxIndex - 1){ midIndex = minInde + (maxIndex - minIndex) / 2; if(strcmp(arr[midIndex], v) <= 0) minIndex = midIndex; else maxIndex = midIndex; } // 先判断序号大的 if(!strcmp(arr[maxIndex], v)) return maxIndex; else if (!strcmp(arr[minIndex], v)) return minIndex; else return -1;}

entry.title: 编程之美 3.5 最短摘要的生成
